steps.title: Spot what motivated Green and Extavour
steps.content: The passage states that while Zhang explored shared genetic mechanisms and Moczek explored different ones, “the relative prevalence... is still poorly understood.” This gap motivated Green and Extavour to evaluate both types of convergence in a single study.

steps.title: Match the motivation to the correct answer
steps.content:
Choice C states the study addresses convergence “more comprehensively”—which was needed because the prior studies were separately focused on one type each.

  • A falsely assumes a prior belief
  • B invents unsupported data reuse
  • D wrongly says Zhang also compared both types
.

This matches choice C — C is correct.
